title: ‘F@#$ you’ shock in Knysna Council
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The two words, “F@#$ you!” directed at DA Councillor Jason White by Knysna Municipal Manager Ombali Sebola, elicited shock and outrage during a Special Council meeting on Friday 3 May.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The two words, “F@#$ you!” directed at DA Councillor Jason White by Knysna Municipal Manager Ombali Sebola, elicited shock and outrage during a Special Council meeting on Friday 3 May."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The meeting was called to consider a second letter from Western Cape Local Government Minister Anton Bredell relating to his notice of Province’s intention to intervene in Knysna Municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the swearing incident, Sebola apologised to those present saying: “I am apologising to Council for the previous exchange of words between me and Councillor White.","html":"Following the swearing incident, Sebola apologised to those present saying: “I am apologising to Council for the previous exchange of words between me and Councillor White."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I apologise to Councillor White for talking to him like that,” said Sebola.","html":"“I apologise to Councillor White for talking to him like that,” said Sebola."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Asked by KPH for comment, White said: “I have not accepted the MM's apology. I don't think it was enough. My comment did not warrant the response from the Municipal Manager. Including the ‘f… you’ comment.”","html":"Asked by KPH for comment, White said: “I have not accepted the MM's apology. I don't think it was enough. My comment did not warrant the response from the Municipal Manager. Including the ‘f… you’ comment.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more about the incident in this week’s Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more about the incident in this week’s Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
